title: Glow-TTS: A Generative Flow for Text-to-Speech via Monotonic Alignment Search

round-A_JuniorNano_output.reasoning: Reasoning: This item is a full-length conference paper that introduces Glow-TTS, a flow-based generative model for parallel text-to-speech, producing audio-domain outputs (mel-spectrograms transformed to wave via WaveGlow) and including extensive experiments on single- and multi-speaker datasets, speed/robustness analyses, and controllability. One-sentence summary: It should be strongly included.

round-A_JuniorNano_output.reasoning: This paper clearly centers on a generative audio model application with audio outputs. title: SDMuse: Stochastic Differential Music Editing and Generation via Hybrid Representation
